creator: akosiaris@gmail.com
text:
Hello, approved. Thanks for the patch.


On Wed, Mar 6, 2013 at 10:01 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of devel/py-celery,
>
> Please note that PR ports/176699 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/176699
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
